title: Salesforce Developer#SGUnitedJobs
description:
We are looking for a number of Salesforce Developers (Junior to Senior level) with hands-on experience in Salesforce development and configuration, preferably within Salesforce Industries (Public Sector Solutions) and Omnistudio.

Responsibilities:
• Design, build, and configure Salesforce applications to meet business process and application requirements.
• Develop and enhance system functionality through configurations and, where required, Apex or Visualforce customizations.
• Utilize Salesforce Omnistudio components (including Omniscripts, Integration Procedures, and DataRaptors) to deliver scalable solutions.
• Configure and support packaged or SaaS applications, manage releases, and maintain system stability.
• Conduct technical analysis and contribute to the design and configuration for system integrations and customizations.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to gather requirements, develop solutions, and implement enhancements.
• Perform thorough testing and quality assurance to ensure high reliability and performance.
• Provide technical guidance, training, and support to team members and stakeholders on Salesforce features and best practices.
• Stay current with industry trends, Salesforce updates, and best practices to continuously improve system performance and team effectiveness.

Requirements:

• Technical Skills:
– Proficiency in Salesforce Omnistudio (Omniscripts, Integration Procedures, DataRaptors) is highly preferred.
– Experience with Salesforce Industries / Public Sector Solutions is a strong advantage.
– Knowledge in Packaged Development Estimating, Packaged Application Integration, and Software Platforms is beneficial.

• Certifications:
a. Salesforce Platform App Builder
b. Salesforce JavaScript Developer I
c. Salesforce Platform Developer I
d. Salesforce Platform Developer II

Nice to Have:
• Exposure to Salesforce Omnistudio advanced configurations or Public Sector Solutions (PSS) modules.
• Experience leading small teams or mentoring junior developers.
• Familiarity with low-code tools, APIs, and packaged application development methodologies.
